summary: Iteration 23: Complete testing of multiple new features - ALL PASSED. Backend refactoring (provider routes in routers/provider.py), SumUp integration (MOCKED - simulation mode), auto-invoice generation on orders, participant invoice section, organizer landing page updates, register role options, and organizer boutique commission label fix.
passed_tests: GET /api/provider/catalog returns products (provider routes work after extraction)
POST /api/shop/order creates order AND returns invoice_id
OrgaLandingPage: 'Boutique integree, zero stock' in ecosystem section
RegisterPage: Shows 3 role options (Participant, Organisateur, Prestataire)
EventShopPage: Commander buttons visible (5 buttons found)
OrganizerDashboard Boutique: 'Commission pour l'organisateur' label visible (NOT 'Commission perçue')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23: All features tested successfully. Backend refactored - provider routes now in /app/backend/routers/provider.py with shared deps in /app/backend/deps.py. SumUp payment is MOCKED (simulation mode when SUMUP_API_KEY env var not set). Auto-invoice generation working - POST /api/shop/order returns invoice_id. Participant dashboard shows invoices section at bottom of page. Organizer landing page (/organizers) has 'Boutique personnalisee' feature card and ecosystem section. Register page has 3 role options. Organizer boutique shows 'Commission pour l'organisateur' label (not old 'Commission perçue').
mocked_api_note: SumUp payment integration runs in SIMULATION mode when SUMUP_API_KEY environment variable is not set. Orders are created but no actual payment processing occurs.
